hooks.command: bash -c 'O="$CLAUDE_TOOL_OUTPUT"; echo "$O" | grep -qE "Unable to simultaneously satisfy constraints" && echo "💡 Auto Layout conflict. Try: skill axiom-uikit"; echo "$O" | grep -qE "Actor-isolated|Sendable|data race|@MainActor" && echo "💡 Concurrency issue. Try: skill axiom-concurrency"; echo "$O" | grep -qE "no such column|FOREIGN KEY constraint|migration" && echo "💡 Database migration issue. Try: skill axiom-data"; echo "$O" | grep -qE "retain cycle|memory leak|deinit.*never called" && echo "💡 Memory issue detected. Try: skill axiom-performance"; echo "$O" | grep -qE "CKError|CKRecord.*error" && echo "💡 CloudKit issue. Try: skill axiom-data"; echo "$O" | grep -qE "ubiquitous.*error|iCloud Drive|NSFileCoordinator" && echo "💡 iCloud Drive issue. Try: skill axiom-data"; echo "$O" | grep -qE "file.*disappeared|file not found|storage.*full" && echo "💡 File storage issue. Try: skill axiom-data"; echo "$O" | grep -qE "FileProtection|data protection|file.*locked" && echo "💡 File protection issue. Try: skill axiom-data"; echo "$O" | grep -qE "error:.*module.*not found|linker command failed" && echo "💡 Build configuration issue. Try: /axiom:fix-build"; exit 0'
bash -c 'if [[ "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" == *.swift ]] && command -v swiftformat &>/dev/null; then swiftformat "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" --quiet || true; fi; exit 0'
